steps.assistant_text: Manual exact match. Key lever: keep a single pointer local, assign it from each nested field load, then advance p = (char*)p + 0x18 before OR/storing. This preserves the target addiu v0,v0,0x18 form and keeps the second half in v0; direct p[6] collapsed the addiu, while the all-inline expression used v1 in the second half.

metadata.verification: Verified build/src/timproc_uso_b3/timproc_uso_b3.c.o vs expected/src/timproc_uso_b3/timproc_uso_b3.c.o with mips-linux-gnu-objdump -dr -M no-aliases; function bytes/disassembly match exactly. Full make RUN_CC_CHECK=0 still reports project ROM MISMATCH unrelated to this byte-identical function.
